mapper.sql: t.id AS t_id,t.create_time AS t_create_time,t.update_time AS t_update_time,t.task_id AS t_task_id, t.task_type AS t_task_type,t.task_name AS t_task_name,t.description AS t_description,t.task_mode AS t_task_mode, t.schedule_start_time AS t_schedule_start_time,t.schedule_end_time AS t_schedule_end_time, t.interval_seconds AS t_interval_seconds,t.next_plan_time AS t_next_plan_time, t.schedule_version AS t_schedule_version,t.state AS t_state,t.priority AS t_priority, t.last_execution_id AS t_last_execution_id,t.last_execute_time AS t_last_execute_time, t.completed_time AS t_completed_time,t.planned_count AS t_planned_count,t.success_count AS t_success_count, t.failed_count AS t_failed_count,t.missed_count AS t_missed_count,t.cancelled_count AS t_cancelled_count, t.progress_current AS t_progress_current,t.progress_total AS t_progress_total, t.progress_message AS t_progress_message,t.progress_revision AS t_progress_revision,t.biz_key AS t_biz_key, t.subject_type AS t_subject_type,t.subject_id AS t_subject_id,t.payload AS t_payload, t.payload_version AS t_payload_version,t.result_ref_type AS t_result_ref_type,t.result_ref_id AS t_result_ref_id, t.result_summary AS t_result_summary,t.last_failure_code AS t_last_failure_code, t.last_failure_message AS t_last_failure_message,t.origin_task_id AS t_origin_task_id, t.origin_execution_id AS t_origin_execution_id,t.owner_type AS t_owner_type,t.owner_id AS t_owner_id, t.organization_id AS t_organization_id,t.idempotency_key AS t_idempotency_key,t.version AS t_version, c.id AS c_id,c.create_time AS c_create_time,c.update_time AS c_update_time,c.task_id AS c_task_id, c.device_id AS c_device_id,c.channel_id AS c_channel_id,c.device_name_snapshot AS c_device_name_snapshot, c.channel_name_snapshot AS c_channel_name_snapshot,c.retention_policy AS c_retention_policy, c.capture_options AS c_capture_options,c.version AS c_version
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM tb_biz_task t INNER JOIN tb_image_collection_config c ON c.task_id=t.task_id
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC,t.task_id DESC

SELECT FROM tb_biz_task t INNER JOIN tb_image_collection_config c ON c.task_id=t.task_id
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC,t.task_id DESC LIMIT 1
